creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: nemysis
Date: Fri Feb  7 16:02:32 2014
New Revision: 343274
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/343274
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r343274/

Log:
  - Update to 2.0.0, Announce message:
      New level track "Contributions" for unofficial, community-made levels
      New levels: aliens, pacman
      Moved remaining unfinished levels and some finished levels to
       "contributions"
      More bugfixes
  
  - Add PORTEPOCH
  - Change master sites, use SAVANNAH instead of not existing page
  - Take maintainership
  - Add license (GPLv2)
  - Use the new format for LIB_DEPENDS
  - Remove USE_GMAKE (USES gmake), build good without
  - Disable all warnings with -w
  - Support STAGEDIR and add OPTIONS_SUB
  - Add DOCS, NLS and Options
  - Symlink the icon
  - Add patch, fix build ngettext
  
  PR:		ports/173875
  Submitted by:	nemysis (self)
  Approved by:	Matthew Gibson <mdg583@gmail.com> (previous maintainer)

Added:
  head/games/cuyo/files/
  head/games/cuyo/files/patch-src__cuyo.cpp   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/games/cuyo/Makefile
  head/games/cuyo/distinfo
  head/games/cuyo/pkg-plist

Modified: head/games/cuyo/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/cuyo/Makefile	Fri Feb  7 15:57:25 2014	(r343273)
+++ head/games/cuyo/Makefile	Fri Feb  7 16:02:32 2014	(r343274)
@@ -2,29 +2,49 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	cuyo
-PORTVERSION=	2.1.1
-PORTREVISION=	6
+PORTVERSION=	2.0.0
+PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	games
-MASTER_SITES=	http://mirror.publicns.net/pub/nongnu/cuyo/
-DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-2.~-1.1
+MASTER_SITES=	SAVANNAH
 
-MAINTAINER=	mdg583@gmail.com
+MAINTAINER=	nemysis@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Nice, innovative, challenging Tetris-like game
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=	aa.1:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/aalib mikmod.2:${PORTSDIR}/audio/libmikmod
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
+LIB_DEPENDS=	libaa.so:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/aalib \
+		libmikmod.so:${PORTSDIR}/audio/libmikmod
+
+USES=		iconv
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
 USE_SDL=	mixer image
 USE_XORG=	xdmcp xau x11
-USES=		iconv
+CFLAGS+=	-w
 INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
 
-MAN6=		cuyo.6 cual.6
+PORTDOCS=	NEWS TODO
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS NLS
+OPTIONS_SUB=	yes
+
+NLS_CONFIGURE_ENABLE=	nls
+NLS_USES=	gettext:run
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-install:
-	@${ECHO} Installing ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/cuyo.png
-	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/icons/cuyo-32x32.png ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/cuyo.png
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MNLS}
+. for f in de
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/share/locale/${f}/LC_MESSAGES ; \
+		${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/po/${f}.gmo \
+		${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/share/locale/${f}/LC_MESSAGES/${PORTNAME}.mo
+. endfor
+.endif
+
+	${LN} -sf ${PREFIX}/share/icons/hicolor/64x64/apps/${PORTNAME}.png \
+		${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/
+
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS:S|^|${WRKSRC}/|} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/games/cuyo/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/games/cuyo/distinfo	Fri Feb  7 15:57:25 2014	(r343273)
+++ head/games/cuyo/distinfo	Fri Feb  7 16:02:32 2014	(r343274)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (cuyo-2.~-1.1.tar.gz) = 7157aa70ae731c17e765fba11736866f2020826ad6187d8df6c55039d4481de6
-SIZE (cuyo-2.~-1.1.tar.gz) = 3005426
+SHA256 (cuyo-2.0.0.tar.gz) = 531cfb989087199f643ac4b18ff9cc50793cc3fa07ee06f394f73d153c09ae34
+SIZE (cuyo-2.0.0.tar.gz) = 3821330

Added: head/games/cuyo/files/patch-src__cuyo.cpp
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/games/cuyo/files/patch-src__cuyo.cpp	Fri Feb  7 16:02:32 2014	(r343274)
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- ./src/cuyo.cpp.orig	2012-01-17 14:47:38.000000000 +0100
++++ ./src/cuyo.cpp	2014-02-01 18:48:07.000000000 +0100
+@@ -53,6 +53,7 @@
+ /* # Zeitschritte, die nach der Zeitbonus-Animation noch gewartet wird */
+ #define nachbonus_wartezeit 50
+ 
++char * ngettext (char * msgid, const char * msgid_plural, unsigned long int n) {return msgid;}
+ 
+ 
+
